description: Create the foundation row of stitches on the needle.
steps: Make a slip knot and place on left needle.
Wrap working yarn around thumb.
Insert needle under yarn on thumb, catch loop, and place on needle.
Repeat until required number of stitches.

description: Securely finish the edge of knitting so stitches do not unravel.
steps: Knit two stitches.
Lift first stitch over second and off the needle.
Knit next stitch.
Lift first over second and off.
Repeat until one stitch remains, cut yarn and pull through.

description: The fundamental knitting stitch. Creates a smooth 'V' pattern on the right side of fabric.
steps: Insert right needle into front of stitch on left needle.
Wrap yarn counter-clockwise around right needle.
Pull loop through stitch.
Slide old stitch off left needle.

description: The second fundamental stitch. Creates a bump on the right side, smooth on the wrong side.
steps: Bring yarn to front of work.
Insert right needle into front of stitch from right to left.
Wrap yarn counter-clockwise around right needle.
Pull loop through and slide old stitch off.

description: Create an extra stitch and a deliberate hole, used in lace and eyelets.
steps: Bring yarn to front between needles.
Knit next stitch — yarn wraps over needle creating a new loop.

description: Decrease one stitch by knitting two stitches as one. Leans right.
steps: Insert right needle into next two stitches on left needle as if to knit.
Wrap yarn and knit them together.
Slide both old stitches off.

description: Decrease one stitch. Leans left, mirrors k2tog.
steps: Slip next stitch knitwise.
Slip next stitch knitwise.
Insert left needle into front of both slipped stitches.
Knit them together through back loops.

description: Move a stitch from left needle to right without working it.
steps: Insert right needle into stitch as if to purl.
Slide stitch to right needle without wrapping yarn.

description: Decrease one stitch by passing a slipped stitch over a worked stitch.
steps: Slip one stitch knitwise.
Knit the next stitch.
Use left needle to lift slipped stitch over knitted stitch and off needle.

description: Increase one stitch by knitting into front and back of same stitch.
steps: Knit into front of stitch but do not slide off.
Knit into back of same stitch.
Slide old stitch off — two new stitches created.

description: Increase one stitch leaning left. Nearly invisible.
steps: Lift horizontal strand between stitches with left needle from front to back.
Knit into back of lifted strand.

description: Increase one stitch leaning right. Nearly invisible.
steps: Lift horizontal strand between stitches with left needle from back to front.
Knit into front of lifted strand.

description: Used in short rows to prevent holes. Wrap yarn around stitch before turning work.
steps: Bring yarn to front.
Slip next stitch purlwise.
Move yarn to back.
Slip stitch back to left needle.
Turn work and continue knitting.

description: Place a stitch marker on the needle to mark a position.
steps: Slide marker onto right needle.

description: Move marker from left needle to right needle.
steps: When you reach marker, slip it from left to right needle and continue.

description: Take marker off needle.
steps: Slide marker off needle.

description: The public, smooth side of the fabric (the side that faces out).
steps: Work pattern as written for right side.

description: The private, bumpy side of the fabric (the side that faces in).
steps: Work pattern as written for wrong side, often purling all stitches.

description: A short needle used to hold stitches temporarily while cabling.
steps: Slip indicated stitches onto cable needle.
Hold cable needle at front or back of work as instructed.
Knit stitches from left needle, then from cable needle.

description: Cable crossing 4 stitches, holding first 2 at front. Stitches slant left.
steps: Slip 2 stitches onto cable needle and hold at front.
Knit 2 stitches from left needle.
Knit 2 stitches from cable needle.

description: Cable crossing 4 stitches, holding first 2 at back. Stitches slant right.
steps: Slip 2 stitches onto cable needle and hold at back.
Knit 2 stitches from left needle.
Knit 2 stitches from cable needle.

description: One complete circuit of stitches in circular knitting.
steps: Work all stitches in the round from beginning-of-round marker back to marker.

description: Work the specified sequence again.
steps: Work the instructions between asterisks or brackets the number of times indicated.

description: The basic unit of knitted fabric.
steps: One loop on the needle.

description: Generic instruction to add one or more stitches.
steps: Use specified increase method (kfb, M1L, yo, etc.).

description: Generic instruction to remove one or more stitches.
steps: Use specified decrease method (k2tog, ssk, p2tog, etc.).

description: Work a stitch through its back leg instead of front, twisting the stitch.
steps: Insert needle into back leg of stitch instead of front.
Work stitch as directed (knit or purl).

description: Bring yarn to front of work before next stitch.
steps: Move yarn between needles to front side of fabric.

description: Take yarn to back of work before next stitch.
steps: Move yarn between needles to back side of fabric.

description: Knit a stitch through its back loop, creating a twisted stitch.
steps: Insert right needle into back loop of stitch.
Wrap yarn and knit as usual.

description: Purl a stitch through its back loop, creating a twisted stitch.
steps: Bring yarn to front.
Insert right needle into back loop from left to right.
Purl as usual.

fullName: Slip Knit Two Together Pass Slipped Stitch Over
description: Double decrease removing two stitches. Leans left.
steps: Slip 1 stitch knitwise.
Knit 2 stitches together.
Pass slipped stitch over the k2tog.

fullName: Slip Two Knit One Pass Slipped Stitches Over
description: Centred double decrease. Three stitches become one.
steps: Slip 2 stitches together knitwise.
Knit 1 stitch.
Pass both slipped stitches over the knit stitch.

description: Centred double decrease. Three stitches become one with centre stitch on top.
steps: Slip 2 stitches together knitwise.
Knit 1 stitch.
Pass both slipped stitches over.

description: Knit a stitch through its back loop.
steps: Insert needle into back loop.
Knit stitch.

description: Decrease one stitch leaning left.
steps: Slip 1 stitch knitwise.
Knit 1 stitch.
Pass slipped stitch over knitted stitch.

description: Decrease two stitches. Leans right.
steps: Insert right needle into next 3 stitches as if to knit.
Knit all 3 together.

description: Decrease one stitch on a purl row. Leans right on wrong side.
steps: Insert right needle into next 2 stitches as if to purl.
Purl them together.

description: Decrease two stitches on a purl row.
steps: Insert right needle into next 3 stitches as if to purl.
Purl them together.

description: Increase one stitch by purling into front and back.
steps: Purl into front of stitch, do not slide off.
Purl into back of same stitch.
Slide old stitch off.

description: Nearly invisible increase leaning left.
steps: Use left needle to pick up stitch two rows below last stitch on right needle.
Knit into picked-up stitch.

description: Nearly invisible increase leaning right.
steps: Use right needle to pick up stitch below next stitch on left needle.
Place on left needle and knit.

description: Alternate name for some lifted increase methods.
steps: Follow pattern instructions for specific lifted increase.

description: Alternate name for some lifted increase methods.
steps: Follow pattern instructions for specific lifted increase.

description: Create a small raised bump of stitches.
steps: Into one stitch, work (k1, yo, k1, yo, k1) — 5 stitches made.
Turn and purl 5.
Turn and knit 5.
Turn and purl 2 together three times.
Pass remaining stitches over first.

description: Create a bobble on a purl background.
steps: Work bobble as for MB but beginning and ending with purl stitches.

description: Slip a stitch as if to knit.
steps: Insert right needle into stitch as if to knit.
Slide to right needle without working.

description: Slip a stitch as if to purl.
steps: Insert right needle into stitch as if to purl.
Slide to right needle without working.

description: Decrease one stitch. Same as skp.
steps: Slip 1 knitwise.
Knit 1.
Pass slipped stitch over.

description: Knit into stitch below current one on needle, used in brioche.
steps: Insert right needle into stitch directly below next stitch on left needle.
Knit as usual.

description: Purl into stitch below current one on needle, used in brioche.
steps: Bring yarn to front.
Insert right needle into stitch directly below next stitch.
Purl as usual.

fullName: Slip One Pass Slipped Stitch Over
description: Decrease one stitch.
steps: Slip 1 knitwise.
Knit next stitch.
Pass slipped stitch over.

description: Lifted increase leaning left.
steps: Pick up left loop of stitch two rows below and knit.

description: Lifted increase leaning right.
steps: Pick up right loop of stitch below next stitch and knit.

description: Knit stitch together with its paired yarn over in brioche knitting.
steps: Knit next stitch together with its yarn over.

description: Purl stitch together with its paired yarn over in brioche knitting.
steps: Purl next stitch together with its yarn over.

fullName: Slip One With Yarn In Front
description: Slip stitch with yarn held at front, creating a float.
steps: Bring yarn to front.
Slip next stitch purlwise.

fullName: Slip One With Yarn In Back
description: Slip stitch with yarn held at back.
steps: Take yarn to back.
Slip next stitch purlwise.

description: A short needle with points at both ends, used for small circumference knitting.
steps: Distribute stitches evenly across 3 or 4 dpns.
Knit with a fifth needle.

description: Two short needle tips joined by a flexible cable.
steps: Cast on stitches.
Join to work in the round, or use for flat knitting.

description: The number of stitches and rows per unit of measurement, determining fabric size.
steps: Knit a swatch larger than 10cm/4in.
Wash and block as final project will be.
Measure stitches and rows in centre of swatch.

description: Wet or steam finished knitting to even stitches and set shape.
steps: Soak finished piece in lukewarm water.
Gently squeeze out water.
Lay flat on towel and pin to desired dimensions.
Allow to dry completely.

description: Rip out knitting ('rip it, rip it').
steps: Remove needles and pull yarn to unravel stitches.

description: Undo knitting one stitch at a time ('knit' backwards).
steps: Insert left needle into stitch below last worked stitch on right needle.
Gently pull working yarn to release stitch.

description: The edge stitch of a piece.
steps: Work first and last stitch of every row in a consistent manner for neat edges.

description: Fabric made by knitting every row. Creates ridges.
steps: Knit all stitches on every row.

description: Smooth fabric: knit right side, purl wrong side.
steps: Knit all stitches on right side rows.
Purl all stitches on wrong side rows.

description: Textured fabric alternating knit and purl stitches.
steps: Row 1: *K1, P1* repeat.
Row 2: *P1, K1* repeat.
Repeat these two rows.

description: Stretchy fabric with vertical columns, used for cuffs and edges.
steps: Alternate knit and purl stitches (e.g., K1, P1 or K2, P2).
Work same pattern on every row.

description: A narrow tube of knitting, used for straps and edges.
steps: Cast on 3-5 stitches.
Knit all stitches.
Do not turn — slide stitches to other end of needle.
Bring yarn across back and knit again.

description: Seamless grafting of live stitches together.
steps: Thread tail onto tapestry needle.
Front needle: purl on, knit off.
Back needle: knit on, purl off.
Repeat until all stitches grafted.

description: Add new stitches by picking them up from an edge.
steps: With right needle, insert into edge stitch.
Wrap yarn and pull up a new loop.
Repeat evenly along edge.

description: Invisible vertical seam for stockinette fabric.
steps: Thread yarn onto tapestry needle.
Weave under two bars between edge stitch and next stitch.
Alternate sides, pulling snug every few stitches.

fullName: Slip Two Knit One Pass Two Over
description: Double decrease. Three stitches become one.
steps: Slip 2 stitches together knitwise.
Knit 1 stitch.
Pass both slipped stitches over knit stitch.

description: The foundation of crochet. Creates a starting row of loops.
steps: Yarn over hook.
Pull through loop on hook.

description: The shortest crochet stitch. Used for joining, edging, and moving across fabric.
steps: Insert hook into stitch.
Yarn over and pull through stitch and loop on hook.

description: The shortest standard crochet stitch. Creates dense, firm fabric.
steps: Insert hook into stitch.
Yarn over and pull up a loop (2 loops on hook).
Yarn over and pull through both loops.

description: A stitch between single and double crochet in height.
steps: Yarn over.
Insert hook into stitch and pull up a loop (3 loops on hook).
Yarn over and pull through all 3 loops.

description: A common, versatile stitch twice the height of single crochet.
steps: Yarn over.
Insert hook into stitch and pull up a loop (3 loops on hook).
Yarn over, pull through 2 loops.
Yarn over, pull through remaining 2 loops.

description: A tall stitch, three times the height of single crochet.
steps: Yarn over twice.
Insert hook into stitch and pull up a loop (4 loops on hook).
Yarn over, pull through 2 loops three times.

description: A very tall stitch.
steps: Yarn over three times.
Insert hook into stitch and pull up a loop.
Yarn over, pull through 2 loops four times.

description: An extremely tall stitch.
steps: Yarn over four times.
Insert hook into stitch and pull up a loop.
Yarn over, pull through 2 loops five times.

description: Work two stitches into one stitch to add stitches.
steps: Work 2 specified stitches into same stitch.

description: Work two stitches together to reduce stitch count.
steps: Work specified stitches together as one.

description: An adjustable loop for starting crochet in the round.
steps: Wrap yarn around fingers to form a loop.
Insert hook into loop, yarn over and pull up.
Work stitches into ring.
Pull tail to close ring.

description: Securely end crochet work.
steps: Cut yarn leaving a tail.
Yarn over and pull tail completely through last loop.
Pull tight.

description: Work stitches into back loop only, creating a ridge.
steps: Insert hook into back loop of stitch only.
Work stitch as usual.

description: Work stitches into front loop only, creating texture.
steps: Insert hook into front loop of stitch only.
Work stitch as usual.

description: Stitch worked around post from front, creating raised ridge.
steps: Yarn over.
Insert hook from front to back around post of indicated stitch.
Complete as double crochet.

description: Stitch worked around post from back, creating recessed ridge.
steps: Yarn over.
Insert hook from back to front around post of indicated stitch.
Complete as double crochet.

description: Short raised stitch worked from front around post.
steps: Insert hook from front to back around post.
Complete as single crochet.

description: Short recessed stitch worked from back around post.
steps: Insert hook from back to front around post.
Complete as single crochet.

description: The space created by one or more chain stitches.
steps: Work indicated stitch into the open space below chain stitches.

description: Connect end of round to beginning with a slip stitch.
steps: Insert hook into first stitch of round.
Yarn over and pull through all loops on hook.

description: Flip work to crochet in opposite direction.
steps: Chain turning stitches as directed.
Turn work over and crochet next row in opposite direction.

description: One complete circuit of stitches in circular crochet.
steps: Work all stitches from beginning marker back to marker.

description: Work the specified sequence again.
steps: Work instructions between asterisks or brackets the indicated number of times.

description: An open area between stitches.
steps: Work indicated stitch into designated space.

description: Miss the specified number of stitches.
steps: Do not work into next stitch(es); move to following stitch.

description: Wrap yarn over hook, used in taller stitches and lace.
steps: Wrap yarn from back to front over hook.

description: Mark a position in the round.
steps: Place stitch marker in indicated stitch or space.

description: Decrease one stitch in single crochet.
steps: Insert hook into stitch, pull up loop.
Insert hook into next stitch, pull up loop (3 loops on hook).
Yarn over, pull through all 3 loops.

description: Decrease one stitch in double crochet.
steps: Yarn over, insert hook into stitch, pull up loop.
Yarn over, pull through 2 loops.
Yarn over, insert hook into next stitch, pull up loop.
Yarn over, pull through 2 loops.
Yarn over, pull through remaining 3 loops.

description: Decrease one stitch in half double crochet.
steps: Yarn over, insert hook into stitch, pull up loop.
Yarn over, insert hook into next stitch, pull up loop.
Yarn over, pull through all 5 loops.

description: Neater decrease for amigurumi and tight fabric.
steps: Insert hook into front loop only of next stitch.
Insert hook into front loop only of following stitch.
Yarn over and pull through 2 loops.
Yarn over and pull through 2 loops.

description: A group of stitches worked into one stitch, creating a fan shape.
steps: Work multiple stitches (usually 5 dc) into same stitch.
Skip stitches on either side as directed.

description: Stitches worked together but not completed until final yarn over.
steps: Work specified stitches partially into adjacent stitches.
Yarn over and pull through all remaining loops together.

description: A raised, textured bump created by working multiple stitches into one.
steps: Work (dc, yo, insert hook, pull up) 4-5 times in same stitch without completing.
Yarn over and pull through all loops on hook.

description: A soft, rounded textured stitch.
steps: Yarn over, insert hook and pull up a loop to height of stitch.
Repeat 2-3 more times in same stitch.
Yarn over and pull through all loops on hook.

description: A raised, pinched textured stitch.
steps: Work 5 dc into same stitch.
Remove hook from loop, insert into first dc of group.
Pull loop through and tighten.

description: A long single crochet worked into a row below, creating vertical bars.
steps: Insert hook into stitch one or more rows below.
Pull up loop to current row height.
Complete as single crochet.

description: Also called centre single crochet. Creates knit-like V fabric.
steps: Insert hook between the 'V' of the stitch below, under horizontal bar.
Complete as single crochet.

description: A small, puffy textured stitch.
steps: Insert hook, pull up loop.
Yarn over, insert hook, pull up loop.
Yarn over, pull through 4 loops.
Yarn over, pull through last 2 loops.

description: A decorative stitch creating V shapes.
steps: Work (dc, ch 1, dc) into same stitch or space.

description: Crossed stitches creating X shapes.
steps: Skip stitch, work dc into next stitch.
Work dc into skipped stitch crossing over first dc.

description: Two dc stitches that cross over each other.
steps: Skip 1 stitch, dc in next.
Dc in skipped stitch, crossing behind first dc.

description: A coiled, rope-like decorative stitch.
steps: Yarn over 7-10 times.
Insert hook into stitch and pull up loop.
Carefully pull through all loops on hook.
Yarn over and pull through final loop to secure.

description: Scale-like textured stitch popular for dragon and mermaid designs.
steps: Work a foundation of V-stitches.
Around first post of V, work 5 dc from top to bottom.
Around second post, work 5 dc from bottom to top.
Repeat around each V-stitch.

description: A lacy, open stitch using a large dowel or broomstick.
steps: Pull up loops onto a large dowel.
Slide groups of loops off and work stitches into them.

description: A delicate, looped lace made on a hairpin loom.
steps: Wrap yarn around hairpin loom.
Crochet centre strip connecting loops.
Remove from loom and join loops as directed.

description: Create foundation chain and first row simultaneously.
steps: Chain 2.
Insert hook into second chain from hook, pull up loop.
Yarn over, pull through 1 loop (chain made).
Yarn over, pull through 2 loops (sc made).

description: Create foundation chain and first row of dc simultaneously.
steps: Chain 3.
Yarn over, insert hook into 3rd chain, pull up loop.
Yarn over, pull through 1 loop.
Yarn over, pull through 2 loops twice.

description: A slightly taller single crochet.
steps: Insert hook into stitch, pull up loop.
Yarn over, pull through 1 loop.
Yarn over, pull through 2 loops.

description: A slightly taller double crochet.
steps: Yarn over, insert hook, pull up loop.
Yarn over, pull through 1 loop.
Yarn over, pull through 2 loops twice.

description: Creates a dense, knit-like fabric.
steps: Insert hook under horizontal bar at centre of stitch below.
Complete as single crochet.

description: A small decorative loop used in edgings.
steps: Chain 3.
Slip stitch into first chain.
Continue working next stitch.

description: Work slip stitches on surface of fabric for decorative lines.
steps: Insert hook from front to back through fabric.
Yarn over and pull to surface.
Insert hook into next position and slip stitch.

description: Reverse single crochet creating a twisted cord edge.
steps: Do not turn work.
Work single crochet from left to right (backwards).

description: Shape and set finished crochet by wetting and pinning.
steps: Wash or steam piece.
Pin to desired dimensions on blocking mat.
Allow to dry completely.

description: Rip out crochet stitches ('rip it, rip it').
steps: Remove hook and pull yarn to unravel stitches.

description: Basic Tunisian crochet stitch creating a woven look.
steps: Forward pass: Insert hook under front vertical bar, yarn over and pull up loop. Leave all loops on hook.
Return pass: Yarn over, pull through 1 loop, then yarn over and pull through 2 loops across.

description: Tunisian stitch that looks like knitting.
steps: Insert hook between front and back vertical bars.
Yarn over and pull up loop.

description: Tunisian stitch with a bump on the front.
steps: Bring yarn to front of hook.
Insert hook under front vertical bar.
Yarn over and pull up loop.

description: A lacy, open stitch creating long loops.
steps: Draw up a long loop.
Yarn over and pull through.
Single crochet in loop to secure.

description: Creates loops of yarn on fabric surface for texture.
steps: Insert hook into stitch.
Wrap yarn around index finger.
Yarn over and pull through, leaving loop on surface.

description: Same as crab stitch — work backwards for twisted edge.
steps: Do not turn.
Work sc from left to right.

description: The loop of the stitch closest to you.
steps: Insert hook under front loop only.

description: The loop of the stitch farthest from you.
steps: Insert hook under back loop only.

description: The vertical body of a stitch, worked around for texture.
steps: Insert hook from front or back around post of indicated stitch.

description: Start a new round or colour without a slip stitch join.
steps: Pull up loop to height of stitch.
Yarn over and work stitch as usual.

description: Alternative name for magic ring.
steps: See Magic Ring (MR) instructions.

description: The loose end of yarn left after fastening off.
steps: Weave tail into fabric with tapestry needle to hide.

description: Working with multiple colours, carrying unused yarn across back.
steps: Work over unused colour as you crochet.
Switch colours as directed by pattern.

description: Creating textured patterns by working around post stitches.
steps: Work post stitches around stitches from previous rows.
Build up layered texture.

description: Open mesh fabric creating pictures and patterns.
steps: Work blocks of dc and empty mesh spaces (ch-2, skip 2).
Follow chart for pattern.

description: Diagonal box stitch worked from one corner to opposite.
steps: Work blocks of 3 dc in a diagonal direction.
Increase at beginning of row, decrease at end.

description: Alternating sc and ch-1 creating open, textured fabric.
steps: Row 1: Sc in 2nd ch from hook, *ch 1, skip 1, sc in next* repeat.
Row 2: Sc in ch-1 space, *ch 1, sc in next ch-1 space* repeat.

description: Classic clusters of 3 dc separated by chains.
steps: Work 3 dc, ch 2, 3 dc into same space.
Skip stitches and repeat in next space.

description: A V-stitch made with incomplete dc clusters.
steps: Work partial dc into same stitch twice.
Yarn over and pull through all loops.
Chain 1, repeat in same stitch.

description: A V-stitch made with puff stitches.
steps: Work puff stitch, ch 1, puff stitch in same space.

description: A textured stitch creating star or flower shapes.
steps: Pull up loops in next 5 stitches or spaces.
Yarn over and pull through all 6 loops.
Chain 1 to close (eye).

description: A puffy, textured petal-like stitch.
steps: Pull up 3 loops in same stitch to height of dc.
Yarn over, pull through 4 loops.
Chain to close.
